name: Criteo S.A.
business: Criteo provides a Commerce Intelligence Platform that connects brands, agencies, retailers, and media owners to deliver personalized advertising and measurable commerce outcomes using AI and commerce data.

exposures.sentence: Powered by Artificial intelligence ("AI") and informed by $1 trillion in annual commerce transactions, our technology enables discovery, engagement, and conversion across the shopper journey.
As of December 31, 2025, our 11 data centers operated 27,793 servers equipped with nearly 1 million CPU cores, more than 9 million GPU cores, and over 6.8 million GiB of memory.
Global ecommerce continues to expand rapidly.

catalysts.event: Shareholder vote on transfer of legal domicile from France to Luxembourg
catalysts.sentence: The Conversion requires a shareholder vote for approval, which will be conducted through a general meeting of the Company s shareholders on February 27, 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of cross-border conversion to Luxembourg
catalysts.sentence: If shareholder approval is obtained, and the other conditions are satisfied or waived, the Conversion is expected to be completed in the third quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Retail Media SAM (excluding Amazon and China) expected to reach ~$42 billion by 2026 and $50 billion by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: In Retail Media, excluding Amazon and China, our Serviceable Available Market ("SAM") is expected to reach approximately $42 billion in advertising spend by 2026 and $50 billion by 2027, reflecting a compound annual growth rate of about 20%.

tamClaims.claim: Total Addressable Market (including Amazon and China) projected to reach ~$204 billion by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: Including Amazon and China, the Total Addressable Market ("TAM") is projected to reach approximately $204 billion by 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Performance Media SAM expected to reach ~$143 billion by 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that our SAM in performance media will reach approximately $143 billion by 2026 across addressable channels.
